nasb.text: For dogs have surrounded me; A band of evildoers has encompassed me; They pierced my hands and my feet.

esv.text: For dogs encompass me; a company of evildoers encircles me; they have pierced my hands and feet—

cnv.text: 犬類圍著我， 惡黨環繞我， 他們扎了我的手我的腳。

ccb.text: 恶人包围我，犹如一群恶犬， 他们刺伤我的手脚。

csbs.text: 群狗围绕我，一伙恶党包围我， 他们刺穿我的双手、我的双脚；
